sources.name: UCDP Candidate Georeferenced Event Dataset
sources.note: Uppsala Conflict Data Program; preliminary monthly event data, free for academic and non-commercial use

notes: columns per event row: [lat, lon, bestDeaths, monthIdx, countryIdx, dyadIdx, typeOfViolence]
bestDeaths is UCDP's best estimate of fatalities for the event; zero-fatality clashes are retained
candidate GED is preliminary data and is revised in later annual GED releases
